title: Create or revise compact pack content
goal: Create or revise one bounded piece of PersonaKit content without expanding product scope or bloating recurring context.

steps.text: Inspect the existing PersonaKit root before proposing new content.
Classify the request as persona, directive, kit, essential, skill, intent, reference, or session.
Ask only high-impact shaping questions when the target entity or boundary is unclear.
Dry-run the appropriate personakit create command before writing.
Write only the approved compact content.
Validate the root and report the result.

acceptanceCriteria: The created or revised content has one clear purpose
Existing entities are reused when they fit
Dry-run output is inspected before writing
Essentials remain compact unless long-form policy is explicitly requested
